ValidationRule.description: A Contract Item's Start & End Date must be within Contract's Start & End Date
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Start_Date__c)) && NOT(ISBLANK(End_Date__c)) && NOT( AND( Start_Date__c >= Contract__r.Contract_Start_Date__c, Start_Date__c <= Contract__r.Contract_End_Date__c, End_Date__c >= Contract__r.Contract_Start_Date__c, End_Date__c <= Contract__r.Contract_End_Date__c ) ), true, false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Contract Item's Start & End Date must be within Contract's Start & End Date
